assignments.name: error
assignments.value: Champs requis manquants: tenant_id, client_final_id, lignes

parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(numero FROM 5) AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1 as next_num FROM invoices WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenant_id }}'

INSERT INTO invoices (id, type, tenant_id, numero, client_final_id, montant_ht, tva, montant_ttc, statut, created_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'vente', '{{ $json.tenant_id }}', 'FAC-' || LPAD({{ $json.next_num }}::text, 4, '0'), '{{ $json.client_final_id }}', {{ $json.montant_ht }}, {{ $json.tva }}, {{ $json.montant_ttc }}, 'brouillon', NOW()) RETURNING *

INSERT INTO invoice_lines (id, invoice_id, designation, quantite, prix_unitaire_ht, total_ht, ordre)
SELECT gen_random_uuid(), '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid, x.designation, x.quantite, x.prix_unitaire_ht, x.total_ht, x.ordre
FROM json_to_recordset($${{ $('Parse Lignes').item.json.lignes_json }}$$::json) AS x(designation text, quantite int, prix_unitaire_ht decimal, total_ht decimal, ordre int)
RETURNING *

meta.description: Crée une facture avec auto-numérotation FAC-XXXX et lignes d'articles
